qa_pairs.question: What specific modules are required to run AMBERtools version 21 on CPUs when using the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run AMBERtools version 21 on CPUs with the StdEnv/2020 environment, the necessary modules are `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 scipy-stack ambertools/21`.

qa_pairs.question: Which modules should be loaded to use AMBERtools version 21 for GPU-accelerated calculations with CUDA under the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: For GPU-accelerated calculations using AMBERtools version 21 with CUDA in the StdEnv/2020 environment, you should load `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.4 openmpi/4.0.3 scipy-stack ambertools/21`.
